ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each player (e.g., De BruyneMCIMID) */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the player was born */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city and country) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the team */,
  "president_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team president */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the team */,
  "sponsors" TEXT /* List of sponsors associated with the team */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_president_id FOREIGN KEY ("president_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's contract */,
  "previous_clubs" TEXT /* List of previous clubs managed by the manager */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards received by the manager */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager's agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "player_id" TEXT /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "corners_taken" INTEGER /* Number of corners taken by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists_made" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the player (percentage) */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles completed by the player */,
  "tackles_made" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "key_passes" INTEGER /* Number of key passes made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was in an offside position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "score_home" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "score_away" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second assistant referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_assistant_referee1_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee1_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_assistant_referee2_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_referee2_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium (city and country) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that owns the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was last renovated */,
  "longitudinal_coordinates" REAL /* Longitude coordinates of the stadium */,
  "latitudinal_coordinates" REAL /* Latitude coordinates of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stadiums_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., player, match) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
